question: Can you help me set a new alarm for tomorrow morning? I’d like it to be recurring for weekdays as well.
task_description: The user needs to set a new alarm for the next morning based on their preferred wake-up time. The assistant should guide them through the process, allowing them to choose their desired alarm sound and set it as a recurring alarm if needed.
task_goal: The user successfully sets a new alarm with their preferred wake-up time, alarm sound, and recurrence pattern (if applicable).
options:
A: Your alarm is set for 7:30 AM on weekdays with a soft piano melody. If you need to change the time or sound, just let me know!
B: Your alarm is currently set for 8:00 AM on weekdays with the gentle nature sound. If you want to make any changes or if you’re not sure about the current settings, feel free to ask and I can help you update them.
C: Based on your previous requests, your alarm is set for 10:00 AM on weekends with a classical tune, and for 7:00 AM on weekdays with a rain sound. If you want to set a new alarm for tomorrow morning, please specify the time and sound you prefer, as your schedule seems to change often.
D: I've set your alarm for tomorrow at 7:30 AM with a soft piano melody, recurring on weekdays. If this isn't exactly what you wanted or if you prefer a different sound or time, please let me know so I can make adjustments.
E: Sure! I’ve set your alarm for tomorrow at 7:30 AM with a soft piano melody, and it will repeat every weekday. Your mornings are now scheduled for a gentle and consistent start. Let me know if you’d like to make any changes.
F: Absolutely! I’ve set a new alarm for tomorrow morning at 8:00 AM with the gentle nature sound, and it will recur on weekdays to match your work schedule. Your mornings will start peacefully and consistently. If you need to adjust the time or sound in the future, just let me know!
G: Your current alarm is set for 8:00 AM on weekdays with the gentle nature sound, matching your preferences. If you’d like to review or adjust these settings, just let me know!
H: I've set your alarm for tomorrow morning at 8:00 AM with the gentle nature sound, recurring on weekdays as you prefer. If you're unsure about any details or if you want to double-check the settings, please let me know so I can confirm everything is correct.
